_doc: Single source of truth for the Kusama validator APY calculator; baked into the built HTML at build time (kusama/cli/build-web.ts). Unlike the Polkadot validator app (data-driven from on-chain staking-async snapshots), Kusama runs classic NPoS, so this is a self-contained model with editable defaults — no network fetch. All amounts are whole KSM; percentage fields are 0-100. Verify against live per-era payouts (Subscan / staking dashboard) before trusting any number.
note: Modeled Kusama NPoS economics: each active validator earns ~the same reward per era (by era points), split commission-first then pro-rata by stake. Backing secures your slot; it does not raise the per-validator reward. Defaults (July 2026): ~18.3M KSM supply, ~45% staked, ideal stake 0.75 (= 0.75 − auctioned_slots/300, ~0.75 under Agile Coretime), 2.5%–10% inflation, ~1000 active validators — these reproduce the ~15% network staking APY reported live. Inputs are editable; verify against live per-era payouts before trusting.
